data.name: appointment.patient_is_own_doctor
data.value: Patient cannot be their own doctor.

data.name: appointment.payment_not_allowed
data.value: Payments are not allowed when appointment is in '{0}' status.

data.name: appointment.payment_exceeds_slot_price
data.value: Payment of {0} would exceed slot price {1}. Remaining: {2}.

data.name: appointment.already_started
data.value: Cannot cancel an appointment after it has started.

data.name: appointment.not_confirmed_for_complete
data.value: Only confirmed appointments can be completed. Current status: '{0}'.

data.name: appointment.not_confirmed_for_no_show
data.value: Only confirmed appointments can be marked as no-show. Current status: '{0}'.

data.name: appointment.free_confirm_with_price
data.value: ConfirmFree is only valid for appointments with zero price.

data.name: appointment.free_confirm_wrong_status
data.value: Cannot confirm a free appointment from status '{0}'.

data.name: money.payment_amount_zero
data.value: Payment amount must be positive (greater than zero).
